narrative:
Union South A (precinct in Clinton County) has 397 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 49.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 42.6 percentage points.
